---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a change to the tool's behavior, scope, or extension points
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

The change in one sentence.

## Why

What support-team workflow does this enable that doesn't work today?

## Scope considerations

This project has hard scope rules (see `CLAUDE.md`):
- Local-first only (no SaaS / hosted infra dependencies beyond LLM/embedding API calls)
- Single operator, single workspace (no multi-tenant features)
- Augments humans only (no auto-reply to customers)
- No telemetry / phone-home

If your request would change one of these, please explain why the trade-off is worth it. Out-of-scope requests are usually closed politely with a pointer to the constraint they touch.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds did you try? What's missing about them?
